typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		STATION as string,
		DATE as string,
		SOURCE as string,
		LATITUDE as string,
		LONGITUDE as string,
		ELEVATION as string,
		NAME as string,
		REPORT_TYPE as string,
		CALL_SIGN as string,
		QUALITY_CONTROL as string,
		WND as string,
		CIG as string,
		VIS as string,
		TMP as string,
		DEW as string,
		SLP as string,
		AA1 as string,
		AA2 as string,
		AA3 as string,
		AB1 as string,
		AD1 as string,
		AE1 as string,
		AH1 as string,
		AH2 as string,
		AH3 as string,
		AH4 as string,
		AH5 as string,
		AH6 as string,
		AI1 as string,
		AI2 as string,
		AI3 as string,
		AI4 as string,
		AI5 as string,
		AI6 as string,
		AJ1 as string,
		AK1 as string,
		AL1 as string,
		AM1 as string,
		AN1 as string,
		AT1 as string,
		AT2 as string,
		AT3 as string,
		AT4 as string,
		AT5 as string,
		AT6 as string,
		AT7 as string,
		AT8 as string,
		AU1 as string,
		AU2 as string,
		AU3 as string,
		AW1 as string,
		AW2 as string,
		AW3 as string,
		AW4 as string,
		AX1 as string,
		AX2 as string,
		AX3 as string,
		AX4 as string,
		ED1 as string,
		GA1 as string,
		GA2 as string,
		GA3 as string,
		GD1 as string,
		GD2 as string,
		GD3 as string,
		GD4 as string,
		GE1 as string,
		GF1 as string,
		KA1 as string,
		KA2 as string,
		KB1 as string,
		KB2 as string,
		KB3 as string,
		KC1 as string,
		KC2 as string,
		KD1 as string,
		KD2 as string,
		KE1 as string,
		KG1 as string,
		KG2 as string,
		MA1 as string,
		MD1 as string,
		MF1 as string,
		MG1 as string,
		MH1 as string,
		MK1 as string,
		MV1 as string,
		MW1 as string,
		MW2 as string,
		MW3 as string,
		MW4 as string,
		MW5 as string,
		OC1 as string,
		OD1 as string,
		OE1 as string,
		OE2 as string,
		OE3 as string,
		RH1 as string,
		RH2 as string,
		RH3 as string,
		WA1 as string,
		REM as string,
		EQD as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> source1
Filter1 derive(TMPinF = round(multiply(divide(toInteger(split(TMP,',')[1]),10),1.8) +32,2)) ~> TMPInFarenheit
source1 filter(REPORT_TYPE == 'FM-15') ~> Filter1
TMPInFarenheit derive(Date1 = toTimestamp(concat(substring(DATE,1,4),'-',substring(DATE,6,2),'-',substring(DATE,9,2),' ',substring(DATE,12,2),':',substring(DATE,15,2),':',substring(DATE,18,2)))) ~> createnewdate
createnewdate keyGenerate(output(ID as long),
	startAt: 1L) ~> SurrogateKey1
SurrogateKey1 select(mapColumn(
		ID,
		Dateofobs = Date1,
		TMPinF
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> selectonlytemptime
selectonlytemptime sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:['dtwweathertmps'],
	truncate: true,
	umask: 0022,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> outputsinglejson
selectonlytemptime sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	filePattern:'dtwhistoric[n]',
	truncate: true,
	umask: 0022,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> outputparquet
selectonlytemptime sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	truncate: true,
	umask: 0022,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> outputcsv

properties.description: Gets the LatLong from the Oakland County addresses.

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		type as string,
		properties as (hash as string, number as string, street as string, unit as string, city as string, district as string, region as string, postcode as string, id as string),
		geometry as (type as string, coordinates as double[])
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	documentForm: 'documentPerLine') ~> source1
Filter1 derive(longitude = slice(geometry.coordinates, 1, 1)[1],
		latitude = slice(geometry.coordinates, 2, 1)[1]) ~> DerivedColumn1
source1 filter(properties.hash=='e36dafc3f388dfd6') ~> Filter1
source1 foldDown(unroll(geometry.coordinates),
	mapColumn(
		type,
		properties,
		points = geometry.coordinates
	),
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: false,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: false) ~> Flatten1
source1 filter(properties.hash=='e36dafc3f388dfd6') ~> Filter2
Filter2 derive(longitude = geometry.coordinates[1],
		latitude = geometry.coordinates[2]) ~> DerivedColumn2
DerivedColumn1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	umask: 0022,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> sink1

source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	documentForm: 'documentPerLine') ~> source1
source1 sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	store: 'cache',
	format: 'inline',
	output: true,
	saveOrder: 1) ~> JSONNeeded
